      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teeschani/ kas no Jehka-
ba atlits starp teem Paganeeim/
tas buhs dauds Lauschu Widdû/
kà weens Lauwa starp teem
Mescha Swehreem/ kà tweens
jauns Lauwa starp teem Awju
gannaueem Pulkeem/ kas/ kad
tas pahreet/ tad faminn un fa-
vlohsa wiꞥſch/ ka neweens warr
iſglahbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tawa Rohka buhs pa-
augstinata pahr taweem Pret-
tincekeem/ un wiſſi tawi Eenaid-
neeki taps tsdeldetti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "lin tas notiks tai Dee-
nà/ takka tas KUNGS: Ka
es tawus Sirgus no tawa Wid-
dus tsdeldeschu/ un tawus Rat-
tus nomettischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tsdeldeschu tohs
Pilsfahthus tawas Semmes/ un
nolaufischu wiſſus tawus Stip-
rumus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tsdeldefchu tahs Leezibu prett manni!
Burschanas no tawas Rohkas/
ka nekahdi Sihlneeki pee tewim
effus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tsdeldefchu tawus
Deeweektus/ un tawus elkadee-
wigus Stabbus no tawa Wid-
dus/ ka tew ne buhs wairs klan-
nitees preekſch tawu Rohku
Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es istaknofchu arridsan
tawus elkadeewigus Meschus no-
tawa Widdus/ un isnihzinaschu
ns Pilsfahthus.
Un es atreebſchohs ar
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta VI. Modalla.
Weena Waideſhana pahr to Lauschu M
jibu un Wiltibu: 1/3. Ar weenab ſ
bas/ ka tee nei zaar faweem Uppu
nedà zaar fawu Deewa Kalpoſchan
Bet zaar paklausigu Mihleſtibu un Q
moſchann warr ar Deewa falibdsinat
Ja ne/ tad taps tee ar wiſſadaſm G
bahm peemeſleti : 10/13.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klaufajt jelle/ ko
KUNGS fakta:
lees/ barrees ar
Kalneem/ un lai tee Pakaln
wu Balkfui dsird.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klaufajt juhs Kaln
Sohda Leetu ta KUNGA/
ar teem stipreem Painatt
tahs Gemmes/ jo tain KL
GAM irr weena Sohda L
ar faweenu Laudim/ un wi
gribb ar Ifraeta teesatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak manna Tauta! Ko
mu es tew darrijs? ar ko e
es tew gruhtu darrijs? D
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es esmu terwi no E
tes Gemmes uhsweddis/ uu
wi no ta Wahrgu Nammo

tijs Mohsu/ un Aäronu/
Mirjamu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Manna Tauta/ peem

Taifnibu atſihſti.
"

      "text": "Ar ko ceſchu es taim Ku
